summary: Complete frontend testing of Additional Offer Detail Screen changes. All 9 features verified: no sidebar for extra offers (full width), horizontal summary strip with source badge, Location column, full SMR text, grouping default OFF, main offers retain sidebar, unified header badges. Bulgarian language throughout.
critical_code_review_comments: Line 635-651: Summary strip correctly renders only for offer.offer_type === 'extra' with 'Източник: Допълнителни СМР' badge
Line 653-655: Conditional grid layout: full width for extra offers, 3/4+1/4 for main offers
Line 766: Location column header conditionally rendered for extra offers
Lines 106-109 and 129-131: Grouping defaults to OFF for extra offers via offer.offer_type === 'extra' check
Lines 1069-1108: Right sidebar with totals card only rendered when offer.offer_type !== 'extra'
Lines 536-546: Unified header with offer_no + type badge (amber for extra, blue for main) + status badge
seed_data_creation: None needed - used existing offers OFF-0103 (extra) and OFF-0104 (main)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Extra offer detail screen fully tested. Key testids: offer-editor-page, summary-strip, grouping-toggle, totals-card, lines-table. OFF-0103 is extra offer with 3 lines showing Location column. OFF-0104 is main offer with sidebar. All features working as expected.

Extra offer shows NO right sidebar (full.notes: totals-card not present for extra offers, table uses full width

Extra offer has horizontal summary strip.notes: summary-strip shows BGN 425.38 subtotal, BGN 85.08 VAT, BGN 510.46 total

Summary strip shows 'Източник: Допълните.notes: Badge visible with 'Създадена от 3 допълнителни СМР' text

KSS table has Location column for extra.notes: ЛОКАЦИЯ column header present in table headers

Location column extracts location from l.notes: Shows 'Ет.1, Баня' and 'Ет.1, Спалня, Родителска' extracted from line.note

Full SMR text visible (not clipped to sh.notes: Full text visible: 'Направа на Отвор за вентилатор с тухлен комин', 'Демонтаж на декоративни корнизи', etc.

Grouping toggle defaults to OFF for extr.notes: grouping-toggle has aria-checked=false, data-state=unchecked for extra offers

Main offers (offer_type!=extra) still ha.notes: OFF-0104 shows 'Обобщение' sidebar with subtotal, VAT, total
